---
title: "Wetland Complexes - vegetation"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "09/07/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)

ANAE_prop_5 <- read_excel("raw/Wetland_vege_summs_newboundary.xlsx", sheet = "Major_>5%")

ANAE_5_long <- pivot_longer(ANAE_prop_5, c("proportion","area.ha"),"Names")
```


# MDB ANAE DATA
```{r Stacked bar plots}
# reorder ANAE_TYPE for ANAE_5_long
ANAE_5_long$ANAE_TYPE <- factor(ANAE_5_long$ANAE_TYPE,levels = c( 
  "Other",
  "Lp1.1: Permanent lake",                             
  "Lt1.1: Temporary lake",
  "Rp1.4: Permanent lowland stream",
  #"Pp4.2: Permanent wetland",
  #"Pt4.1: Floodplain or riparian wetland",
  "Pt2.2.2: Temporary sedge/grass/forb marsh",
  "Pt2.3.2: Freshwater meadow",
  "Pp2.1.2: Permanent tall emergent marsh",
  "Pt1.7.1: Lignum riparian zone or floodplain", 
  "Pt1.8.1: Riparian or floodplain shrubland",
  "Pt1.8.2: Temporary shrub swamp",
  "Pt1.6.1: Riparian or floodplain woodland",
  "Pt1.4.1: River cooba riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.3.1: Coolibah riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.6.2: Temporary woodland swamp",
  "Pt1.1.1: River red gum riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.2.1: Black box riparian zone or floodplain"
  ))

facet_names <- setNames(c( "Percentage area", "Area (ha)"), unique(ANAE_5_long$Names))
legend_order <- c("Lp1.1: Permanent lake", "Lt1.1: Temporary lake","Pp2.1.2: Permanent tall emergent marsh","Pt1.1.1: River red gum riparian zone or floodplain", "Pt1.2.1: Black box riparian zone or floodplain","Pt1.3.1: Coolibah riparian zone or floodplain","Pt1.4.1: River cooba riparian zone or floodplain","Pt1.7.1: Lignum riparian zone or floodplain","Pt1.6.1: Riparian or floodplain woodland","Pt1.6.2: Temporary woodland swamp","Pt1.8.1: Riparian or floodplain shrubland", "Pt1.8.2: Temporary shrub swamp","Pt2.2.2: Temporary sedge/grass/forb marsh","Pt2.3.2: Freshwater meadow", "Rp1.4: Permanent lowland stream", "Other")
colour_order <- c("#E31A1C", # red
"green4","skyblue2", "brown","yellow4","darkturquoise", "khaki2",
"#FB9A99", # lt pink
"palegreen2","dodgerblue2",
"#FDBF6F", # lt orange
"#FF7F00", # orange
"black", "gold1", "#CAB2D6", # lt purple
"grey70")

ggplot(ANAE_5_long, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=value, x=Wetland)) +
  #theme_classic() +
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() + # make horizontal
    scale_fill_discrete(limits = legend_order, type = colour_order) +
  labs(y = "", x = "", fill = "") +
  facet_wrap(~Names, scales = "free_x",  labeller = as_labeller(facet_names), strip.position = "bottom") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c('B','C','G','H','L','M','R','P','Y')) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text=element_text(size=14),
        strip.text = element_text(size=14),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.position="bottom",
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.key=element_blank())   +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(ncol=2, keywidth = 3))
 
```
